subcodes.first_line: O dove of the garden of divine knowledge! Observe thou the grace and bounty of God, which hath singled thee out from amidst the [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حمامه حدیقه عرفان فضل و موهبت الهی را ملاحظه نما که ترا از میان حزب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @education of children; moral education
